queue.phase: Lower KS2 transition and representation fluency
queue.subject: Mathematics
queue.reason: roadmap marks this as a pilot-ready priority; roadmap priority 2

expected_pack_definition.teaching_sequence: 6-9 steps with explicit teach, worked example, guided practice, checkpoint, repair and teach-back.
expected_pack_definition.practice_bank: At least 150 pilot, 300 release and 800-1500+ mature planned variants through blueprints.
expected_pack_definition.animation: Manipulative-first animation that makes the structure visible before symbolic fluency.
expected_pack_definition.evidence: Signals, mastery rule, parent summary, teacher evidence and next actions.
expected_pack_definition.accessibility: Low-sensory, reduced-motion, audio-first, reading, attention, processing, confidence and EAL supports.
